user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to add a new job posting, so that I can advertise an open vacancy on a posting channel
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Post Vacancies screen; When I click Add new posting and complete the details; Then a new vacancy posting is created and listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view postings with their posting source, vacancy, department, position level, work location and posting channel, so that I can track where each vacancy is advertised
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Post Vacancies screen; When the list loads; Then each posting shows posting source, vacancy, department, position level, work location, employee class, number of vacancies, dates, status and posting channel

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to see a clear empty state when no postings exist, so that I know none have been created yet
acceptance_criteria: Given there are no vacancy postings; When I open the Post Vacancies screen; Then a No Records Found message is displayed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the postings list, so that I see newly added postings immediately
acceptance_criteria: Given the Post Vacancies screen is open; When I click Refresh; Then the postings list reloads with current data
